name: RDM Manager
description: Sovereign (POPIA-resident) research-data-management module: dataset deposit, AI-assisted human-gated POPIA sensitivity scan, access/embargo + DOI, compliance dashboard. Reverse port of Heratio ahg-rdm (heratio#1337).
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd
features: Dataset wrapper over a container information_object
Per-file deposit as child IO + master digital_object (no bespoke storage)
POPIA sensitivity scan (deterministic + lexicon + gateway NER) [later phases]
Human-gated review of scan findings [later phases]
Access/embargo (ODRL) + DataCite DOI + public landing [later phases]

changelog.0.1.0: Phase 1 (#168): scaffold + Dataset model + deposit via AtoM IngestService
changelog.0.2.0: Phase 2 (#169): PopiaScanService (deterministic + lexicon + gateway NER) + rdm:scan async task + findings UI
changelog.0.3.0: Phase 3 (#170): PopiaGateService — confirm/dismiss findings + provenance + release blocked until gate clear + disposition
changelog.0.4.0: Phase 4 (#171): DatasetReleaseService — ODRL access/embargo policies + env-gated DataCite DOI + public citable landing page
changelog.0.5.0: Phase 5 (#172): ComplianceReportService — filterable per-faculty compliance scoreboard (verdict/findings/access/DOI/DMP)
changelog.0.6.0: Phase 6 (#173): rdm:demo symfony task — full pipeline on 100%-synthetic assets (deposit->scan->gate->restrict->DOI->landing->scoreboard)
changelog.0.7.0: Phase 7 (#174): Feature 1 — DmpLinkService orchestrating the existing ahgResearch DmpService; DMP card on show + line on landing + scoreboard column
changelog.0.8.0: Phase 8 (#175): Feature 3 — DashboardService roll-up (8 KPIs + 5 Chart.js charts + per-faculty posture + gate backlog) with date/faculty filters. Completes epic #167.
